initial_waiting_period_days.source_quote: 3. 30-day waiting period (Excl03) a. Expenses related to the treatment of any illness within 30 days from the first Policy commencement date shall be excluded

specific_disease_waiting_months.source_quote: 2. Specified disease/procedure waiting period- (Excl02) a. Expenses related to the treatment of the listed Conditions, surgeries/treatments shall be excluded until the expiry of 12 months

maternity_waiting_months.source_quote: Any treatment arising from or traceable to pregnancy, child birth including cesarean section and/or any treatment related to pre and postnatal care and complications arising out of Pregnancy and Childbirth until 12 months continuous period has elapsed since the inception of the

pre_hospitalization_days.source_quote: The medical expenses incurred in the 60 days period immediately before you were hospitalised

post_hospitalization_days.source_quote: The medical expenses incurred in the 90 days period immediately after you were discharged

day_care_treatments_count.source_note: Per insurer baseline (Bajaj Allianz Health Guard covers ~130 day care procedures)

ayush_coverage.source_quote: AYUSH Treatment refers to medical expenses incurred on hospitalization under Ayurveda, Yoga and Naturopathy Unani, Siddha and Homeopathy systems

maternity_coverage.source_quote: Maternity Expenses We will pay the Medical Expenses related to pregnancy, childbirth or medically recommended and lawful termination of pregnancy, limited to maximum 2 deliveries or termination(s) or either, during the lifetime of the insured person

newborn_coverage.source_quote: 2. Any Medical Expenses of the new born baby 3. Dental treatment or surgery of any kind unless requiring hospitalization and as a result of accidental Bodily Injury to natural teeth. 4. The cost of spectacles, contact lenses, hearing aids, crutches, artificial limbs, denture

organ_donor_expenses.source_quote: Organ Donor Expenses We will pay for Medical treatment of the organ donor for harvesting the organ i.e. including surgery to remove organs from a donor provided that, i. The organ donor is any person whose organ has been made available in accordance and in compliance with THE TRA

room_rent_capping.value: No specific room rent capping in base (subject to Policy Schedule)
room_rent_capping.source_quote: Reasonable and Customary Medical Expenses Medical Expenses incurred, subject to aggregate deductible as specified on the policy document Aggregate deductible is a cost sharing requirement under this policy that provides that the company will not be liable for a specified rupe

deductible_amount.source_quote: Aggregate deductible is a cost sharing requirement under this policy that provides the company will not be liable for a specified rupee amount

cashless_treatment_supported.source_quote: Cashless facility: Cashless facility means a facility extended by the Insurer to the Insured where the payments, of the costs of treatment undergone by the Insured in accordance with the policy terms and conditions

policy_type.source_quote: Aggregate Deductible Aggregate deductible is a cost sharing requirement under this policy that provides the company will not be liable for a specified rupee amount of the covered expenses, which will apply before any benefits are payable by

_meta.notes: Super top-up product; SI options and deductibles configured per Policy Schedule. CSR + network count are insurer-level. | Batch 3 (2026-05-15): coverage breadth fields backfilled.
